narration: Start slow and fast at the head of the list.
callout: Slow moves 1 step per turn. Fast moves 2 steps.
decision: Watch where slow is when fast runs out of path.

narration: After one turn, slow is at 2 and fast is at 3.
callout: Fast is gaining distance twice as quickly.
decision: Keep moving until fast cannot take two more steps.

predictionPrompt.prompt: When fast reaches the end, where should slow be?

choices.label: Near the middle
choices.feedback: Correct. Slow has taken about half as many steps.

choices.label: Back at the head
choices.feedback: Not this one. Slow keeps moving forward.

narration: Fast can no longer move two steps, so slow is standing on the middle node 3.
callout: That is the one-pass middle trick.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why does the speed difference make slow land halfway?
